hero.headline:
Move Cargo.
Cross Borders.
No Excuses.
hero.subheadline: Apex Transport Group manages end‑to‑end freight logistics across Southern and Central Africa — from finding the right truck to clearing customs at the border.
hero.alt: Freight truck crossing border, golden hour, dust trail.

servicesSection.label: What We Do
servicesSection.heading: Our Services
servicesSection.intro: From documentation to delivery, Apex manages every step of your cross-border freight with precision and care.

border-docs.title: Border Documentation
border-docs.description: Fast, accurate preparation of all cross-border paperwork. We know the requirements for all 8 Southern & Central African countries — no delays at the gate.

customs-clearance.title: Customs Clearance
customs-clearance.description: We navigate customs processes with precision. Our team handles declarations, duties, and compliance so your load never sits at a border unnecessarily.
customs-clearance.keyBenefit: On-ground agents at every major border.

route-planning.title: Route Planning
route-planning.description: Strategic routing that balances speed, cost, and compliance. We factor in road conditions, border wait times, and cargo requirements before a wheel turns.
route-planning.keyBenefit: Real-time adjustments for weather, strikes, or wait times.

transporter-network.title: Transporter Network
transporter-network.description: Your cargo, matched to the right truck. We maintain a strong network of verified transporters across the region, so we always have capacity when you need it.

real-time-monitoring.title: Real-Time Monitoring
real-time-monitoring.description: Hands-on oversight from pickup to delivery. We track every shipment in real-time and proactively handle exceptions before they become problems.

direct-communication.title: Direct Communication
direct-communication.description: Call or WhatsApp us any time. We are South Africa-based and fully reachable — not an automated system, real people who know your load.

process.label: The Process
process.heading: How Apex Works
process.body: Simple for you. Handled by us. Every step of the cross‑border journey is managed end‑to‑end.
process.cardBody: From the moment you contact us to final delivery, we manage every detail — paperwork, routing, border clearance, monitoring. No handoffs. No excuses.
process.alt: Logistics operations – Apex team coordinating freight at a border crossing.
steps: You Have Cargo — Tell us what needs to move, where it's coming from, and where it's going. We handle the rest.
We Find the Truck — We match your load to a verified transporter from our network — the right vehicle, right capacity, right route.
Docs & Border Prep — All border documentation and customs processes are prepared and submitted before the truck even arrives at the gate.
We Monitor Every KM — Real‑time involvement from our team throughout the journey. You get updates. We manage exceptions instantly.
Safe Delivery — Your cargo arrives at destination, on time, with full documentation. No excuses — every load must move.

coverage.label: Where We Operate
coverage.heading: Africa Coverage
coverage.sub: Cross-border freight across Southern and Central Africa. Every border, every document — managed by us.

values.label: Our Principles
values.heading:
Built on
Reliability
principles: Reliability First — Every load must move — no excuses. We do not cancel, we do not delay without communication. Your cargo commitment is our commitment.
Hands-On Operations — We are actively involved in every shipment. Real people, real‑time involvement — not a platform that passes you to a stranger.
Strong Network — Years of building relationships with trusted transporters across the region means we always have the right connection for your load.
Speed & Tech — Digital documentation, rapid processing, and tech‑enabled tracking mean your freight moves faster with less friction at every stage.

techBanner.heading:
Documentation.
Done Fast.
techBanner.body: Cross‑border freight lives and dies on paperwork. Apex uses digital workflows to prepare, submit, and verify all documentation before your truck reaches the border — cutting clearance time dramatically and eliminating common delay points.

contactCta.label: Get In Touch
contactCta.heading: Ready to Move?
contactCta.body: Call or WhatsApp us directly — we're based in South Africa and respond fast. No forms needed if you'd rather talk.

hero.heading: Full-Chain Freight Services
hero.sub: From border docs to final delivery – we own the entire cross‑border process.

hero.heading: Proudly South African — Pan‑African logistics operator
hero.sub: Reg No: 2025/789240/07 | Head Office: Midrand, Gauteng

companyOverview.title: Company Overview
companyOverview.body:
Apex Transport Group has grown exponentially from a domestic heavy‑commodity mover into a fully‑fledged pan‑African logistics operator. We specialise in end‑to‑end movement of bulk and heavy cargo across Southern and Central Africa, connecting industry, mines, and commerce with reliable, hands‑on transport solutions.

Our model is built on one simple principle: every load must move — no excuses. Whether a shipment originates at a South African port or a remote Congolese mine, Apex takes ownership of the entire journey: finding the right truck, preparing border documentation, navigating customs, planning optimal routes, and monitoring progress in real time until safe delivery is confirmed.

list.name: Freight Brokerage
list.description: Vetted network of owner‑operators and fleet carriers handling copper cathodes, cobalt, manganese, coal, chrome, fertiliser, and general bulk goods. Rate negotiation, carrier contracting, load confirmation, dispatch, and real‑time status reporting.

list.name: International Border and Customs Management
list.description: Full administrative chain at every crossing — export/import docs, customs clearance across SA, Zimbabwe, Zambia, DRC, Malawi, Botswana, transit permits, dangerous goods declarations, liaison with border agencies.

list.name: Route Planning and Optimisation
list.description: Mapping safest, fastest, most fuel‑efficient corridors factoring in border delays, road conditions, and security. Real‑time re‑routing when issues arise.

countries.name: South Africa
countries.hubs: Durban (port), Johannesburg (warehousing), Pretoria (HQ), Witbank (coal), Steelpoort (chrome/PGMs), Richards Bay (coal terminal), Kathu (iron ore), Polokwane (northern gateway)

countries.name: DRC
countries.hubs: Katanga and Lualaba provinces — Mutanda, Tenke Fungurume, Kamoto, Ruashi, Kamoa‑Kakula, Kipushi, Kibali gold. Corridors: Lubumbashi to Kasumbalesa to Zambia, Kolwezi export, Kinshasa, Goma/Butembo.

countries.name: Zimbabwe
countries.hubs: Beit Bridge, Forbes/Mutare, Chirundu borders; Great Dyke chrome/platinum/gold; Harare and Bulawayo distribution; tobacco season logistics.

countries.name: Zambia
countries.hubs: Copperbelt (Lusaka, Ndola, Kitwe, Chingola) — key link between DRC and SA ports. Kasumbalesa border (busiest crossing).

countries.name: Malawi
countries.hubs: Blantyre and Lilongwe — agricultural exports (tobacco, tea, sugar) and mining inputs via Tete (Mozambique) and Mchinji (Zambia).

countries.name: Botswana
countries.hubs: Jwaneng/Orapa diamonds, Morupule coal, soda ash. Trans‑Kalahari corridor, Gaborone and Francistown hubs.

whyApex.title: Why Choose Apex Transport Group
guarantees: Every load matched with a compliant, vetted carrier
Border documentation prepared accurately in advance — no preventable delays
Customs managed through trusted agent relationships across all six countries
Real‑time communication with clients throughout transit
Contingency planning activated immediately for any en‑route issue
Dedicated operations contact assigned to each shipment

process.title: How It Works — The Apex Process
steps: Client Enquiry — Share load details, origin, destination, timeline.
Carrier Sourcing — Match right vehicle (flat‑deck, side‑tipper, tanker, lowbed, container).
Documentation Preparation — Export permits, customs entries, transit docs, border clearances before departure.
Dispatch and Route Briefing — Driver fully briefed on route, borders, waypoints, rest stops, emergency contacts.
Border Management — Our agents manage customs at every post to avoid delays.
Real‑Time Monitoring — GPS tracking, driver contact, regular status updates.
Delivery Confirmation — Proof of delivery collected, shipment file closed.

network.title: Network and Partnerships
partners: Vetted fleet owners across SA, Zambia, Zimbabwe
Licensed customs clearing agents at all major border posts
Mining procurement teams in DRC Copperbelt
Port authority contacts — Durban and Richards Bay
Government and regulatory connections for documentation
